ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "nights" INTEGER /* Number of nights booked */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total booking amount */,
  "cleaning_fee" REAL /* Cleaning fee for the booking */,
  "surcharges" REAL /* Surcharges applied to the booking */,
  "min_fee" REAL /* Minimum fee for the booking */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid */,
  "change_value" REAL /* Value of changes made to the booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation if applicable */,
  "rating" REAL /* Guest's rating of the property */,
  "review" TEXT /* Guest's review of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "price_per_night" REAL /* Price per night for the property */,
  "additional_fees" TEXT /* Additional fees applied to the property (e.g., cleaning fee, surcharge) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_bookings" (
  "property_booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-booking association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "booking_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "booking_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "total_nights" INTEGER /* Total number of nights booked */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the booking */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the booking */,
  "final_amount" REAL /* Final amount paid after discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_bookings_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the guest */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the guest */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the guest is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the guest is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the guest */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the guest is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the owner */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the owner is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the owner is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the owner is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the manager */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manager */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the manager is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the manager is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the manager */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manager is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., property manager, accountant, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., cleaning, maintenance, utilities) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_managers" (
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-manager association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_managers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_managers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_owners" (
  "property_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-owner association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_owners_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_owners_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
